description: Founder explains how Pump Fun allows users to create their own cryptocurrency in under two minutes for just $2. It eliminates the need for expensive tools and liquidity, making it accessible for everyone. The platform aims to democratize meme coin creation and trading.
topic_summary: Pump Fun enables users to create and trade meme coins easily and affordably, addressing previous barriers in the crypto space [t=12:88]. The platform's bonding curve ensures fairness in token distribution [t=82:07].
